content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 — WARN — App is login-gated (`App/LoginView.swift` SecureField) with a subscription paywall (`App/PaywallView.swift`), but `review_information/notes.txt` only says "n/a" and does not explain how to reach app-blocking/schedule/report features behind the paywall.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need actionable steps to exercise gated and paid features, or the app may be rejected for incomplete review information. The demo credentials look real (`reviewer@focusshield.example` / non-placeholder password), which is good, but the notes are effectively empty and give no guidance on triggering the Premium subscription or Screen Time blocking flow. Add concrete notes describing how to log in, how to reach the paywall, and (ideally) how the reviewer can test premium functionality without a live purchase.
